A '''type''' of battleship was used by [[Empress/Legends|Empress]] [[Teta/Legends|Teta]] to defeat the rebels of [[Kirrek]]<ref name="TOTJ:GAOTS" /> and later [[Naga Sadow/Legends|Naga Sadow]].<ref name="TOTJ:TFOTSE">''[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire]]''</ref>

{{Ship-stub}}

*[[Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire 3|''Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire'' 3]]
